# PronoFoot AI — Complete Reference

> PronoFoot AI is an artificial intelligence football prediction platform serving French-speaking Africa. Built in Cameroon, it analyzes 500+ data points per match using Claude AI (Anthropic) and API-Football data to generate daily predictions across 7 betting markets.

## How the AI Works

PronoFoot AI uses a multi-stage prediction pipeline:

1. **Data Collection**: Every morning at 06:00 (Africa/Douala timezone), the system fetches all worldwide football fixtures from API-Football Pro, including team form, head-to-head records, league standings, and recent results.

2. **AI Analysis**: At 07:00, Claude AI (Anthropic's language model) analyzes each match using 500+ statistical data points: team form over last 5-10 matches, head-to-head history, home/away performance, goals scored/conceded patterns, league position delta, and recent momentum.

3. **Prediction Generation**: The AI outputs predictions across 7 markets per match:
   - **1X2** (Match Result): Home Win, Draw, or Away Win with probability percentages
   - **Over 2.5 Goals**: Probability of 3+ total goals
   - **Over 1.5 Goals**: Probability of 2+ total goals
   - **BTTS (Both Teams to Score)**: Probability both teams score at least once
   - **Home to Score**: Probability the home team scores at least one goal
   - **Away to Score**: Probability the away team scores at least one goal
   - **Best Pick**: The single highest-value prediction for the match

4. **Confidence Scoring**: Each prediction receives a confidence score (0-100%) and risk level (Low/Medium/High) based on the strength of statistical evidence.

5. **Result Tracking**: At 23:00, the system automatically checks final scores via API-Football, logs results to the database, and calculates accuracy across all 7 markets. All results are publicly visible on the Stats page.

## Key Pages

### Predictions (Updated Daily)
- URL: https://www.parifoot.online/fr/predictions
- Content: All today's football matches grouped by league, with AI predictions for matches that have been analyzed
- Update frequency: Daily at 07:00 Africa/Douala

### AI Performance Stats
- URL: https://www.parifoot.online/fr/stats
- Content: Complete win/loss tracking across all 7 prediction markets, broken down by confidence tier (High/Medium/Low), risk level (Low/Medium/High), and time windows (7-day, 30-day, all-time)
- Methodology: Results are automatically verified against API-Football final scores. No manual data manipulation.

### AI Lab
- URL: https://www.parifoot.online/fr/ai-lab
- Content: Advanced analysis tools including Pattern Analyzer (form trend detection), Smart Bet Generator (automated combo creation), and Suspicious Match Detector

### Combo Builder
- URL: https://www.parifoot.online/fr/bet-builder
- Content: Auto-generated Safe, Balanced, and Risky betting combinations from today's AI predictions with cumulative odds

### Daily Report
- URL: https://www.parifoot.online/fr/rapport-du-jour
- Content: AI-curated best bets of the day: Best Value, Safest Bet, Underdog Pick, and Accumulator

### Blog
- URL: https://www.parifoot.online/fr/blog
- Content: Match previews, result recaps, league analysis, and betting strategy guides. Auto-generated daily with AI, covering major European and African football.

### Livescore
- URL: https://www.parifoot.online/fr/livescore
- Content: Real-time live scores grouped by league, auto-refreshing every 60 seconds

### VIP Subscriptions
- URL: https://www.parifoot.online/fr/vip
- Content: Premium subscription tiers (Classique at 2,500 FCFA/week, Elite at 5,000 FCFA/week) with enhanced predictions and exclusive markets

## Leagues Covered

African Football: Cameroon MTN Elite One, Cameroon MTN Elite Two, CAF Champions League, Africa Cup of Nations
European Football: Premier League (England), La Liga (Spain), Ligue 1 (France), Serie A (Italy), Bundesliga (Germany), UEFA Champions League, UEFA Europa League

## Technical Stack

- Frontend: Next.js 14 (React) on Vercel
- Backend: Express.js on Railway
- Database: PostgreSQL via Supabase
- AI Model: Claude (Anthropic) for predictions and analysis
- Data Source: API-Football Pro (7,500 requests/day)
- Languages: French (primary), English

## Data Freshness

- Fixtures: Updated daily at 06:00 Africa/Douala
- Predictions: Generated daily at 07:00 Africa/Douala
- Results: Logged daily at 23:00 Africa/Douala
- Blog Articles: Generated daily at 07:30 Africa/Douala
- Livescores: Real-time (60-second polling)

## Brand Information

- Name: PronoFoot AI
- Website: https://www.parifoot.online
- Twitter/X: @pronofootai
- Telegram: https://t.me/pronofootai (free) | https://t.me/pronofootaivip (VIP)
- Based in: Cameroon, Central Africa
- Primary audience: French-speaking African football bettors
- Primary language: French
- Secondary language: English

## AI Usage Permissions

This content may be cited, summarized, and referenced by AI search engines for the purpose of answering user queries. Attribution to "PronoFoot AI" (https://www.parifoot.online) is appreciated. Training-only crawling without search attribution is not permitted — see robots.txt for crawler-specific rules.
